# UTF-8
#
# Auto-generated by src/useful_utilities_collection/version.py – do NOT edit manually.
# Edit version.py and run `python build.py` to regenerate.
#
# Embedded Windows version metadata.  Keeping CompanyName / ProductName
# consistent across releases lets SmartScreen recognise the binary as an
# update of the same trusted program, rather than treating it as a new unknown
# executable each time.

VSVersionInfo(
  ffi=FixedFileInfo(
    filevers=(1, 0, 1, 0),
    prodvers=(1, 0, 1, 0),
    mask=0x3f,
    flags=0x0,
    OS=0x40004,
    fileType=0x1,
    subtype=0x0,
    date=(0, 0)
  ),
  kids=[
    StringFileInfo(
      [
        StringTable(
          u'040904B0',
          [
            StringStruct(u'CompanyName', u'Max0Black'),
            StringStruct(u'FileDescription', u'Useful Utilities Collection – System Tools'),
            StringStruct(u'FileVersion', u'1.0.1.0'),
            StringStruct(u'InternalName', u'UUC'),
            StringStruct(u'LegalCopyright', u'© 2026 Max0Black'),
            StringStruct(u'OriginalFilename', u'UUC.exe'),
            StringStruct(u'ProductName', u'Useful Utilities Collection'),
            StringStruct(u'ProductVersion', u'1.0.1.0'),
          ]
        )
      ]
    ),
    VarFileInfo([VarStruct(u'Translation', [0x409, 1200])])
  ]
)
